description: [df] - Report file system disk space usage. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Show disk space in human-readable format (MB, GB)
commands.explanation: Executes the df routine logically to process: show disk space in human-readable format (mb, gb)

commands.description: Show file system types alongside usage
commands.explanation: Executes the df routine logically to process: show file system types alongside usage
Executes the df routine logically to process: show inode usage information
